mapper.select: SELECT ranking_code, label, heat_text, sort_order FROM topic_rankings ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT notice_code, title, meta, sort_order FROM notices ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, post_code, creator_user_id, title, content, author_name, author_handle, topic_name, audience_type, display_time, like_count, comment_count, save_count, accent_tone, badge, image_url, anonymous_flag, location, created_at FROM posts WHERE deleted_flag = 0 AND created_at >= #{since} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, topic_key, display_name, merge_target_key, hidden_flag, pinned_flag, sort_order, updated_by, updated_at FROM trending_topic_rules ORDER BY pinned_flag DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, announcement_code, title, summary, content, category, status, pinned_flag, popup_flag, popup_once_per_session, published_at, expire_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM announcements WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (published_at IS NULL OR published_at <= #{now}) AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > #{now}) ORDER BY pinned_flag DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, announcement_code, title, summary, content, category, status, pinned_flag, popup_flag, popup_once_per_session, published_at, expire_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM announcements WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND popup_flag = 1 AND (published_at IS NULL OR published_at <= #{now}) AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > #{now}) ORDER BY pinned_flag DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, announcement_code, title, summary, content, category, status, pinned_flag, popup_flag, popup_once_per_session, published_at, expire_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM announcements ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, announcement_code, title, summary, content, category, status, pinned_flag, popup_flag, popup_once_per_session, published_at, expire_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM announcements WHERE announcement_code = #{announcementCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: p.id, p.post_code, p.creator_user_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_name, p.author_handle, p.topic_name, p.audience_type, p.display_time, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.save_count, p.accent_tone, p.badge, p.image_url, p.anonymous_flag, p.location, p.created_at, COALESCE(i.liked, 0) AS liked, COALESCE(i.saved, 0) AS saved
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_code, name, tagline, college, grade_year, bio, avatar_url FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT badge_name, sort_order FROM user_badges WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT stat_label, stat_value, sort_order FROM user_profile_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN post_interactions i ON i.post_id = p.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.saved = 1 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT story_code, title, meta, sort_order FROM alumni_stories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.contact_code, c.name, c.meta, c.focus, c.avatar_url, COALESCE(f.followed, 0) AS followed, c.sort_order FROM alumni_contacts c LEFT JOIN user_follow_contacts f ON f.contact_id = c.id AND f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.sql: c.id, c.comment_code, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.root_comment_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.author_name, c.author_handle, c.content, c.deleted_flag, c.deleted_at, c.deleted_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM post_comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE p.post_code = #{postCode} AND c.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(c.root_comment_id, c.id) ASC, CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT
FROM post_comments c WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(c.root_comment_id, c.id) ASC, CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.post_code, p.creator_user_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_name, p.author_handle, p.topic_name, p.audience_type, p.display_time, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.save_count, p.accent_tone, p.badge, p.image_url, p.anonymous_flag, p.location, p.deleted_flag, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by, p.created_at FROM posts p WHERE p.post_code = #{postCode}

SELECT
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_interactions i ON i.post_id = p.id AND i.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.deleted_flag = 0 AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.author_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT story_code, title, meta, sort_order FROM alumni_stories WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR meta LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.contact_code, c.name, c.meta, c.focus, c.avatar_url, COALESCE(f.followed, 0) AS followed, c.sort_order FROM alumni_contacts c LEFT JOIN user_follow_contacts f ON f.contact_id = c.id AND f.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.meta LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.focus LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT id, conversation_code, peer_name, peer_subtitle, peer_avatar_url, last_message, display_time, unread_count, sort_time FROM conversations WHERE owner_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, conversation_code, peer_name, peer_subtitle, peer_avatar_url, last_message, display_time, unread_count, sort_time FROM conversations WHERE owner_user_id = #{userId} AND conversation_code = #{conversationCode}

SELECT m.id, m.message_code, m.conversation_id, c.conversation_code, m.sender_type, m.text_content, m.display_time, m.created_at FROM messages m INNER JOIN conversations c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE c.owner_user_id = #{userId} AND c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE audience_type = #{audience} AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE audience_type = #{audience} AND deleted_flag = 0 AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE() AND created_at < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topics

SELECT id, report_code, target_type, target_code, reporter_user_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, assigned_user_id, resolution_code, resolution_note, resolved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM reports ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, report_code, target_type, target_code, reporter_user_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, assigned_user_id, resolution_code, resolution_note, resolved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM reports WHERE report_code = #{reportCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, actor_user_id, actor_role_snapshot, action_type, target_type, target_id, target_code, created_at FROM audit_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
